name: Caramel Apple Witches
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the caramels and water in a 1 1/2 quart saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth.
2. Wash and dry the apples; insert a stick into the stem end of each apple.
3. Dip each apple into the hot caramel mixture, turning to coat evenly.
4. Scrape off excess caramel from the bottom of the apples.
5. Place the coated apples on a greased waxed paper surface.
6. Use miniature marshmallow halves to create eyes and mouth on the apples.
7. Create a nose using candy corn.
8. Make a hat from construction paper, leaving an opening for the wooden stick.
